changelog: VS Code admin-mode bypass: `runVSCodeCommand` now captures `CombinedOutput` and waits for the process exit code instead of fire-and-forget, ensuring CLI errors are properly detected.
`tryVSCodeDetached` launches `Code.exe` with an isolated `--user-data-dir` (`%TEMP%\gitmap-vscode-user-data`) to bypass the elevated single-instance lock.
Added `resolveVSCodeExecutable` with multi-path discovery (`LookPath`, CLI sibling, `LocalAppData`, `Program Files`, `Program Files (x86)`).
Extracted all VS Code constants into `constants/constants_vscode.go`.
